sql.query: SELECT w.id,w.templateId,w.templateVersionNumber,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,w.status,w.currentStageId,w.ownerUserId,w.ownerTeamId,w.locationId,w.spaceId,w.configurationId,l.locationName,l.locationType,l.townCity,l.postcode,l.isActive AS locationIsActive,s.spaceName,s.isActive AS spaceIsActive,c.configurationName,c.isActive AS configurationIsActive,COALESCE(NULLIF(CONCAT_WS(' / ',l.locationName,s.spaceName,c.configurationName),''),(SELECT CONCAT('Legacy location: ',fv.valueText) FROM tbl_workflow_field_values fv WHERE fv.workflowId=w.id AND fv.tenantId=w.tenantId AND fv.fieldKey='venue' AND NULLIF(fv.valueText,'') IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),'No location recorded') AS effectiveLocation,w.startDate,w.targetDate,COALESCE((SELECT fv.valueDate FROM tbl_workflow_field_values fv WHERE fv.workflowId=w.id AND fv.tenantId=w.tenantId AND fv.fieldKey='show_date' LIMIT 1),w.targetDate) AS showDate,(SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(fv.valueText,''),DATE_FORMAT(fv.valueDate,'%H:%i')) FROM tbl_workflow_field_values fv WHERE fv.workflowId=w.id AND fv.tenantId=w.tenantId AND fv.fieldKey='show_time' LIMIT 1) AS showTime,w.completedDate,w.createdDate,w.modifiedDate,wt.templateName,t.teamName,u.displayName AS ownerName FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=w.templateId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams t ON t.id=w.ownerTeamId AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=w.ownerUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=w.spaceId AND s.locationId=w.locationId AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_space_configurations c ON c.id=w.configurationId AND c.spaceId=w.spaceId AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.id=:id AND w.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
